name: YESCO

current_snapshot.royalty_headline: Greater of $1,000 or 6% of Gross Revenue per month

economics.royalty_raw: Greater of $1,000 or 6% of Gross Revenue per month

validation_questions: Confirm Item 19 cohort size and definition with franchisor.

internal_unresolveds.reason: Loan to YESCO Administration LLC ($7.47M, 78% of assets) is non-interest bearing with no disclosed repayment schedule. Material concentration risk.
Bottom quartile avg GR ($187,862) is below annual TSQ ($250,000). At least 12 franchisees may face territory reduction or termination.
National Advertising Fund not currently active for US. May be established at up to 3% of GR on 30 days notice at franchisor's sole discretion.
Servizio service mark is not federally registered. If challenged, franchisees may need to change at own expense.
Renewal requires signing then-current agreement with potentially 'materially different terms and conditions.' Territory boundaries may change.
Royalty revenue declined 4.9% ($3.37M to $3.21M) from 2023 to 2024 despite stable franchised outlet count (57). Not explained in FDD.
